comment: ADD THIS NODE to Property PDF Processor workflow
instructions: 1. Open your n8n workflow 'Property PDF Processor v0.7'
2. Add a new 'Webhook' node (see settings below)
3. Add a 'Code' node after the webhook to handle the file (see code below)
4. Connect: Webhook → Handle Odoo Upload → Prepare Upload (existing node)
6. Copy the Production webhook URL to Odoo: Settings → Technical → System Parameters

connection.note: Connect Webhook → Handle Odoo Upload → Prepare Upload (skip Filter PDFs for direct uploads)
